scope_caveats: closed-form zero-load latency model ZLL = H*t_r + extra_wire + (L-1) (PPIN §16); t_r calibrated on the §B cardinal mesh and cross-applied to §D — not a full per-flit iSLIP DES
§B is full-curve parity (4 rows incl knee + monotonicity via sweep.hexa mean-field DES); §D is headline-number parity (ZLL@0.05 + hops@0.05 + d6<d4 directional ordering) per rfc_003 §4 §D acceptance
mean hop count H is the exact unweighted BFS shortest-path on the parsed topology graph; extra_wire is the cost-2 d6 diagonal channel surplus
22nm SMART wire-delay; single (node, clock) point — not a regime claim

verdict.rationale: single-(topology,traffic) record; the d4-vs-d6 directional F1 signal is checked by the sweep_oracle_parity orchestrator rows D3/D4 — a pair-verdict aggregator record is a separate interface
